ocr_snippet: Patient Name : Neck - RR - 26/min Temperature- 98.4 F Examination (AT ADMISSION) Class III according to Modified Kuppuswamy scale Child is active and alert Pallor+ , clubbing or pedal edema No icterus, cyanosis lymphadenopathy VITALS: HR - 98/min SpO2 - 98% in R.A. All peripheral pulses well felt ANTHROPOMETRY: HEAD-TOE : Head - normal Face - normal
